title: Ohara’s Will Survives
description: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
scene: Across pages 18, this part follows Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul, Spandine. Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: Just report to the GOROUSEI later.

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: Just for reading ancient letters!? Why!?

dialogue.speaker: Marine soldier
dialogue.text: Have been studying all this time...

summary: Professor Clover and the scholars of Ohara risk everything to protect forbidden history from the World Government.
